meta.homeTitle: YouSum – Free YouTube Transcript & Video Summary Tool
meta.homeDesc: Get a free YouTube transcript and AI video summary in seconds. Generate key takeaways, timestamps, notes, FAQs, and action points from any YouTube video with captions.
meta.howTitle: How YouSum Works | YouTube Transcript & AI Video Summary Tool
meta.howDesc: Learn how YouSum turns YouTube videos into transcripts, AI summaries, key points, timestamps, and FAQs in seconds. Fast, simple, and free to try.

footer: © 2026 YouSum · Not affiliated with YouTube or Google.

home.sub: Paste a YouTube URL to get a full transcript, concise AI summary, key timestamps, notes, and FAQs in seconds.
home.captionNote: Works best with videos that have captions enabled.

features.title: 3-Line Summary
features.desc: Get the core message of any video without watching it.

features.title: Key Points + FAQ
